title: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.2.54-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.54.
- Support matching interface via PCI address. RHEL-121109
- Fix OVSDB query failure on database bigger than 20KiB. RHEL-121990
full_text:
[2.2.54-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.54.
- Support matching interface via PCI address. RHEL-121109
- Fix OVSDB query failure on database bigger than 20KiB. RHEL-121990
